summary: Email Verification Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Tested: POST /api/auth/register (email_verified=false), POST /api/auth/login (email_verified field), GET /api/auth/verify-email (token validation), POST /api/auth/resend-verification (auth required), GET /api/auth/me (email_verified field). Frontend: AuthPage sign up creates account with 'Account created! Check your email' toast, verification banner shows for unverified customers with Resend button, VerifyEmailPage shows error for invalid token, LoginPage admin login works, EnquiryForm blocks unverified users with 'Please verify your email' toast.

tests.test: POST /api/auth/register creates user with email_verified=false
Register response includes email_verified:false in user object
Verification email sent via Resend on registration
POST /api/auth/login returns email_verified field (false for new unverified users)
POST /api/auth/login returns email_verified=true for legacy/admin users
GET /api/auth/verify-email with invalid token returns 400
GET /api/auth/verify-email with valid token sets email_verified=true
Token is consumed after verification (single use)
POST /api/auth/resend-verification requires auth (401/403 without token)
POST /api/auth/resend-verification sends new email for unverified user
POST /api/auth/resend-verification returns 'already verified' for verified user
GET /api/auth/me returns email_verified field
Sign In mode loads with email+password form and social buttons
Switch to Sign Up mode shows Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password fields
Sign Up creates account successfully with unique email
After sign up, toast shows 'Account created! Check your email to verify.'
After sign up, redirects to /my-enquiries
Header shows verification banner (data-testid='email-verification-banner') for unverified customer users
Banner text: 'Please verify your email to submit enquiries.'
Resend button (data-testid='resend-verification-btn') visible
Resend button click shows 'Verification email sent! Check your inbox.' toast
VerifyEmailPage with invalid token shows 'Verification Failed' error
Error message: 'Invalid or expired verification link'
'Go to Sign In' button present (data-testid='verify-signin-btn')
Admin login (admin/admin) works
Admin redirected to /admin/dashboard
EnquiryForm opens for logged in unverified user
EnquiryForm blocks submission for unverified users
Error toast: 'Please verify your email before submitting an enquiry. Check your inbox for the verification link.'

email_case_sensitivity.issue: Registration stored email with original case (e.g., TEST@example.com) but login lowercased email for lookup, causing login to fail
email_case_sensitivity.fix: Modified /api/auth/register to normalize email to lowercase before storage

seed_data_creation: Created test user test_playwright_b528b7@example.com during Playwright tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email verification flow complete. Key data-testids: email-verification-banner, resend-verification-btn, verify-success, verify-error, verify-loading, verify-continue-btn, verify-signin-btn, submit-enquiry-btn. POST /api/auth/register now normalizes email to lowercase before storage (bug fix). Verification tokens stored in MongoDB collection 'verification_tokens'. EnquiryForm checks user.email_verified===false to block submission.
rca_of_the_issue: Found and fixed a case sensitivity bug in registration: emails were stored with original case but login lowercased them, causing lookup to fail. Fixed by normalizing email to lowercase in register endpoint.
